title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.174 - Motorcycle awareness month designated for the month of May
text:
9.174.  Motorcycle awareness month designated for the month of May. — The month of May is hereby designated as "Motorcycle Awareness Month" in the state of Missouri.  The citizens of this state are encouraged to observe the month with appropriate activities and events.
(L. 2013 S.B. 72)
